message: The user-facing agent skill overview still hardcodes Codex for the safe execute-plan step, so the documentation path can still steer non-Codex users to the old command after the lifecycle affordances were de-hardcoded.
evidence: docs/agent-skill.md:31-49 lists the safe default flow and line 48 remains `pactum execute plan --agent codex`; docs/agents.md:315 similarly documents `pactum execute plan <run_id> --agent codex`. The installed skill and workflow reference use `<agent>`, and blame shows these doc lines predate this change, so this is a non-blocking advisory.
